results.name: Mem0 Hierarchical Memory
results.rationale: Mem0 hierarchical memory architecture has no overlap with Aztec dual-cycle calendar mechanism; no xiuhmolpilli, no 365/260 dual stores, no engaged-gears lcm checkpoint.

results.name: Memory Autonomous LLM Agents Survey
results.rationale: General memory survey lacks any dual-cycle calendrical structure, no 52-year fire-renewal purge, no nemontemi GC slot.

results.name: H-MEM Hierarchical Memory EACL 2026
results.rationale: Hierarchical memory paper does not implement engaged-gears dual-modulus 365/260 indexing or xiuhmolpilli extinguish-reinit cycle.

results.name: Hierarchical Memory Long-Term Reasoning
results.rationale: Long-term reasoning hierarchical memory lacks lcm(365,260)=18,980 alignment checkpoint and 20-day-signs x 13-numbers cross-indexed retrieval.

results.name: MemAgents ICLR 2026 Workshop
results.rationale: MemAgents workshop paper does not describe Aztec calendar-inspired dual-cycle stores or fire-renewal purge.

results.name: Garbage Collection LLM Context Management Medium
results.rationale: GC context management shares only abstract notion of purging stale entries; no dual-cycle 365/260 engaged-gears mechanism, no nemontemi 5-day deferred GC slot, no 52-year xiuhmolpilli cycle.

results.name: Agent Memory Paper List
results.rationale: Paper list aggregator has no specific overlap with xiuhmolpilli dual-cycle mechanism or engaged-gears lcm alignment.

results.name: Adaptive Soft Rolling KV Freeze
results.rationale: KV cache freeze approach lacks dual-modulus indexing, lcm checkpoint, fire-renewal extinguish-reinit, and tuple-based 20x13 retrieval.

decision_rationale: None of 8 results hit threshold. Aztec xiuhmolpilli dual-cycle + engaged-gears + fire-renewal + nēmontēmi GC + 20×13 retrieval composite mechanism has no precedent. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on H-MEM + Mem0 + GC-Algorithms + KV-Freeze adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
